name.value: Example of a Nepal Baseline Patient

description.value: A mockup patient record representing Hari Prasad Shrestha to demonstrate validation against the NepalPatient profile.
An extension to categorize the specific local government tier in Nepal (Metropolitan, Sub-Metropolitan, Municipality, or Rural Municipality).
The ultimate national baseline profile for Patients in Nepal, aligning core identifiers (Health ID, Citizenship, National ID), family contexts, and localized federal geography.

name.value: Nepal Caste and Ethnicity Value Set

description.value: The set of allowed codes for capturing a patient's ethnic background in Nepal baseline registries.
The official 77 administrative districts of Nepal sorted by regional alignment.
Value set for enforcing validated district entry across medical records in Nepal.

name.value: Nepal HMIS Caste and Ethnicity Group Code System

description.value: Official classification of caste and ethnic groups utilized by the Ministry of Health and Population (MoHP) Nepal for health management information systems (HMIS).

name.value: Nepal Local Level Tier Code System

description.value: Official code system for types of local governance bodies (Palikas) in Nepal.

name.value: Nepal Local Level Tier Value Set

description.value: Value set for selecting allowed structural types for local governance (Palika) in Nepal.

name.value: Nepal Patient Caste and Ethnicity Extension

description.value: An extension to capture caste or ethnic classifications according to MoHP Nepal digital health guidelines.
The 7 federal provinces of Nepal as established by the Constitution.
Value set for selecting a valid federal province in Nepal.
